'''thasuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hubmaking|hubmaking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hubmaking|hubmaking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thasuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæsiyith|thæsiyith]] || [[word:thæsiyij|thæsiyij]] || [[word:thæsiyish|thæsiyish]] || [[word:thæsiyi|thæsiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasusuyuth|thasusuyuth]] || [[word:thasusuyuj|thasusuyuj]] || [[word:thasusuyush|thasusuyush]] || [[word:thasusuyu|thasusuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasuyuth|thasuyuth]] || [[word:thasuyuj|thasuyuj]] || [[word:thasuyush|thasuyush]] || [[word:thasuyu|thasuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasufyuth|thasufyuth]] || [[word:thasufyuj|thasufyuj]] || [[word:thasufyush|thasufyush]] || [[word:thasufyuf|thasufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thasuyuthu|thasuyuthu]] || [[word:thasuyuju|thasuyuju]] || [[word:thasuyushu|thasuyushu]] || [[word:thasuyuku|thasuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thasuyuth|thasuyuth]] || [[word:thasuyuj|thasuyuj]] || [[word:thasuyush|thasuyush]] || [[word:thasuyu|thasuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thasuyuthul|thasuyuthul]] || [[word:thasuyujul|thasuyujul]] || [[word:thasuyushul|thasuyushul]] || [[word:thasuyukul|thasuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thasuyuthuthu|thasuyuthuthu]] || [[word:thasuyujuju|thasuyujuju]] || [[word:thasuyushushu|thasuyushushu]] || [[word:thasuyuku|thasuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thasuyuthun|thasuyuthun]] || [[word:thasuyujun|thasuyujun]] || [[word:thasuyushun|thasuyushun]] || [[word:thasuyukun|thasuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thasuyuthuoro|thasuyuthuoro]] || [[word:thasuyujuoro|thasuyujuoro]] || [[word:thasuyushuoro|thasuyushuoro]] || [[word:thasuyukuoro|thasuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
